name: token-orb
description: A lightweight, always-on-top desktop orb that shows your AI token balance in real time.
author: TokenOrb Contributors

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:44129 dist-electron/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:44129 electron ."
scripts.build: eslint . && tsc -b && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json
scripts.dist: eslint . && tsc -b && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder
scripts.dist:win: eslint . && tsc -b && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.dist:mac: eslint . && tsc -b && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --mac dmg
